subject: general-knowledge
description: Countries & Their Parliaments MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: The name of Afghanistan's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Afghanistan's parliament is the National Assembly (Shora) — bicameral with the Wolesi Jirga (lower) and Meshrano Jirga (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Albania's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Albania's unicameral parliament is the Kuvendi-i-Shqiperise (Assembly of Albania) — 140 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Algeria's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Algeria's parliament is the People's National Assembly (lower house) along with the Council of the Nation (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Andorra's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Andorra's parliament is the General Council (Consell General) — 28 elected members.

mcqs.q: The name of Angola's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Angola has a unicameral National Assembly of 220 members elected for 5-year terms.

mcqs.q: The name of Argentina's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Argentina's bicameral legislature is the National Congress (Congreso de la Nación) — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Australia's parliament is:
options: Parliament of the Commonwealth of Australia
mcqs.explanation: Australia's bicameral legislature is the Parliament of the Commonwealth of Australia — House of Representatives + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Austria's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Austria's bicameral parliament is the Federal Assembly — Nationalrat (lower) + Bundesrat / Federal Council (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Azerbaijan's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Azerbaijan has a unicameral parliament called Milli Mejlis (National Assembly) — 125 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Bahamas's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The Bahamas has a bicameral Parliament — House of Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Bahrain's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Bahrain's bicameral parliament is the Al-Majlis Al-Watni (National Assembly) — Consultative Council + Council of Representatives.

mcqs.q: The name of Bangladesh's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Bangladesh has a unicameral parliament — the Jatiya Sangsad (House of the Nation) with 350 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Bosnia and Herzegovina's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Bosnia and Herzegovina has a Parliamentary Assembly — House of Representatives + House of Peoples.

mcqs.q: The name of Brazil's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Brazil's bicameral parliament is the National Congress — Chamber of Deputies + Federal Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Bulgaria's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Bulgaria has a unicameral National Assembly (Narodno Sobranie) — 240 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Chile's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Chile's bicameral parliament is the National Congress — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of the Chinese parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The People's Republic of China's unicameral parliament is the National People's Congress (NPC) — nearly 3,000 deputies, the world's largest legislature.

mcqs.q: The name of Croatia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Croatia's unicameral parliament is the Croatian Parliament (Hrvatski Sabor) — 151 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Cuba's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Cuba's unicameral parliament is the National Assembly of People's Power — the supreme organ of state.

mcqs.q: The name of Cyprus's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Cyprus has a unicameral House of Representatives (Vouli Antiprosopon) — 56 active seats.

mcqs.q: The name of Czech Republic's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Czech Republic's bicameral legislature is the Parliament of the Czech Republic — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Denmark's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Denmark has a unicameral parliament called Folketinget — 179 members.

mcqs.q: The name of El Salvador's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: El Salvador's unicameral parliament is the Legislative Assembly (Asamblea Legislativa) — 60 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Estonia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Estonia has a unicameral parliament called Riigikogu — 101 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Equatorial Guinea's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Equatorial Guinea's parliament includes the Chamber of Deputies/House of Representatives plus the Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Finland's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Finland's unicameral parliament is the Eduskunta (Finnish) / Riksdagen (Swedish) — 200 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Georgia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Georgia (the country) has a unicameral Parliament of Georgia (Sakartvelos Parlamenti) — 150 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Greece's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Greece has a unicameral Hellenic Parliament (Vouli ton Ellinon) — 300 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Hungary's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Hungary has a unicameral National Assembly (Országgyűlés) since 2014 — 199 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Iceland's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Iceland's parliament is the Althingi — founded in 930 AD, the world's oldest functioning parliament.

mcqs.q: The name of India's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: India's bicameral parliament is the Sansad — Lok Sabha (lower) + Rajya Sabha (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Indonesia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Indonesia's parliament includes the House of Representatives (DPR) within the broader People's Consultative Assembly (MPR).

mcqs.q: The name of Iran's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Iran's unicameral parliament is the Majles Shoraye Eslami (Islamic Consultative Assembly) — 290 seats.

mcqs.q: The name of Ireland's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Ireland's bicameral parliament is the Oireachtas — Dáil Éireann (lower) + Seanad Éireann (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Israel's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Israel's unicameral parliament is the Knesset — 120 members, based in Jerusalem.

mcqs.q: The name of Italy's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Italy's bicameral legislature is the Parliament of the Italian Republic — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of the Japanese parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Japan's bicameral legislature is the National Diet (Kokkai) — House of Representatives + House of Councillors.

mcqs.q: The name of Kuwait's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Kuwait's unicameral parliament is the Majles Al-Ommah (National Assembly) — 50 elected members.

mcqs.q: The name of Lebanon's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Lebanon's unicameral parliament is the Majlis al-Nuwwab — 128 seats split equally between Christians and Muslims.

mcqs.q: The name of Libya's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Libya's parliament is the House of Representatives, which replaced the General National Congress in 2014.

mcqs.q: The name of Lithuania's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Lithuania's unicameral parliament is the Seimas — 141 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Luxembourg's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Luxembourg's unicameral parliament is the Chamber of Deputies (Chambre des Députés) — 60 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Myanmar's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Myanmar's bicameral legislature is the Assembly of the Union (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) — House of Representatives (Pyithu Hluttaw) + House of Nationalities.

mcqs.q: The name of Malaysia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Malaysia's bicameral parliament is the Parlimen — Dewan Rakyat (lower) + Dewan Negara (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Maldives's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Maldives has a unicameral People's Majlis (Majlis of the Maldives) — 87 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Malta's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Malta has a unicameral House of Representatives — 79 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Mexico's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Mexico's bicameral parliament is the Congress of the Union — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Mongolia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Mongolia's unicameral parliament is the Ulsiin Ih Hural (State Great Khural) — 76 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Netherlands's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The Netherlands's bicameral parliament is the Staten-Generaal (States General) — House of Representatives + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of New Zealand's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: New Zealand has a unicameral House of Representatives — 120 members. The Legislative Council was abolished in 1951.

mcqs.q: The name of North Korea's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: North Korea's unicameral parliament is the Supreme People's Assembly — 687 members elected unopposed.

mcqs.q: The name of Norway's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Norway has a unicameral Stortinget — 169 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Pakistan's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's bicameral parliament is the Majlis-e-Shoora — National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of the Philippines's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The Philippines's bicameral legislature is the Congress of the Philippines — House of Representatives + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Portugal's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Portugal has a unicameral Assembly of the Republic (Assembleia da República) — 230 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Qatar's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Qatar's parliament is the Majlis Al-Shura (Consultative Assembly) — partially elected since 2021.

mcqs.q: The name of South Sudan's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: South Sudan's bicameral parliament is the National Legislature — National Legislative Assembly + Council of States.

mcqs.q: The name of Russia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Russia's bicameral parliament is the Federal Assembly — State Duma (lower) + Federation Council (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of South Korea's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: South Korea has a unicameral National Assembly (Gukhoe) — 300 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Spain's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Spain's bicameral parliament is the Cortes Generales — Congress of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Sweden's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Sweden has a unicameral Riksdagen — 349 members since 1971.

mcqs.q: The name of Switzerland's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Switzerland's bicameral parliament is the Federal Assembly — National Council (lower) + Council of States (upper).

mcqs.q: The name of Syria's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Syria's unicameral parliament is the Majlis al-Sha'ab (People's Assembly) — 250 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Tajikistan's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Tajikistan's bicameral parliament is the Majlisi Oliy (Supreme Assembly) — Majlisi Namoyandagon + Majlisi Milli.

mcqs.q: The name of Tanzania's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Tanzania's unicameral parliament is the Bunge — 393 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Thailand's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Thailand's bicameral parliament is the Rathasapha (National Assembly) — House of Representatives + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Tonga's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Tonga has a unicameral Legislative Assembly (Fale Alea) — 30 seats.

mcqs.q: The name of Türkiye's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Türkiye has a unicameral Grand National Assembly (TBMM) — 600 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Ukraine's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Ukraine has a unicameral Verkhovna Rada (Supreme Council) — 450 seats.

mcqs.q: The name of the UK parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The UK's bicameral legislature is simply called the Parliament of the United Kingdom — House of Commons + House of Lords. It is at Westminster.

mcqs.q: The name of the USA's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: The USA's bicameral legislature is the Congress — House of Representatives + Senate.

mcqs.q: The name of Vietnam's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Vietnam has a unicameral Quoc-Hoi (National Assembly) — about 500 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Yemen's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Yemen's bicameral parliament is the Majlis — House of Representatives + Shura Council.

mcqs.q: The name of Zambia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Zambia has a unicameral National Assembly — 167 members.

mcqs.q: The name of Zimbabwe's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Zimbabwe's bicameral parliament is simply called the Parliament — National Assembly + Senate.

mcqs.q: Parliament is the supreme legislative body of a country where elected representatives:
mcqs.explanation: A parliament is the supreme legislative body where elected representatives debate and pass laws on behalf of the people.

mcqs.q: Which is the world's oldest parliament (930 AD)?
mcqs.explanation: The Althing of Iceland was established in 930 AD at Þingvellir — the world's oldest still-functioning parliament.

mcqs.q: What is the lower chamber of Afghanistan's parliament called?
mcqs.explanation: Afghanistan's lower chamber is the Wolesi Jirga (House of the People) — 250 seats. The upper house is Meshrano Jirga.

mcqs.q: Kuvendi is the unicameral parliament of which country?
mcqs.explanation: Kuvendi (full name Kuvendi-i-Shqiperise) is the unicameral parliament of Albania — 140 members.

mcqs.q: People's National Assembly is the lower house of which country?
mcqs.explanation: The People's National Assembly is the lower house of Algeria; the Council of the Nation is the upper.

mcqs.q: What type of legislature does Angola have?
mcqs.explanation: Angola has a unicameral National Assembly — 220 members elected for 5 years.

mcqs.q: National Assembly is the unicameral parliament of which Caucasus country?
mcqs.explanation: Armenia has a unicameral National Assembly (Azgayin Zhoghov) — 107 members.

mcqs.q: What are the two houses of the Australian Parliament?
mcqs.explanation: Australia's Parliament has two houses — the House of Representatives (lower) and the Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Milli Majlis is the unicameral parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Milli Majlis (National Assembly) is the unicameral parliament of Azerbaijan — 125 members.

mcqs.q: Bahrain's National Assembly consists of the Consultative Council and:
mcqs.explanation: Bahrain's National Assembly is bicameral — Consultative Council (appointed) + Council of Representatives (elected).

mcqs.q: Jatiya Sangsad is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Jatiya Sangsad ('House of the Nation') is the unicameral parliament of Bangladesh — 350 members.

mcqs.q: Belarus has a bicameral parliament consisting of the House of Representatives and:
mcqs.explanation: Belarus's bicameral parliament is the National Assembly — House of Representatives + Council of the Republic.

mcqs.q: The Federal Senate is the upper house of which country?
mcqs.explanation: Brazil's bicameral National Congress includes the Chamber of Deputies (lower) and the Federal Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Tshogdu was the earlier unicameral parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Bhutan's unicameral Tshogdu was replaced in 2008 by the bicameral Parliament — National Assembly + National Council.

mcqs.q: Bolivia's National Congress consists of the Chamber of Senators and:
mcqs.explanation: Bolivia's bicameral Plurinational Legislative Assembly = Chamber of Senators + Chamber of Deputies.

mcqs.q: Chile's National Congress is bicameral with a Senate and:
mcqs.explanation: Chile's National Congress has 50 Senators and 155 Members of the Chamber of Deputies.

mcqs.q: Which is the world's largest legislature?
mcqs.explanation: China's National People's Congress (NPC) — nearly 3,000 deputies — is the world's largest legislature by membership.

mcqs.q: Argentina's lower house is called:
mcqs.explanation: Argentina's bicameral National Congress = Senate (upper) + Chamber of Deputies (lower).

mcqs.q: National Assembly of People's Power is the supreme organ of state power in:
mcqs.explanation: Cuba's National Assembly of People's Power is the supreme organ of state power — 470 members.

mcqs.q: The Legislative Council is the unicameral body of:
mcqs.explanation: Brunei has a unicameral Legislative Council (Majlis Mesyuarat Negara) — 33 appointed members.

mcqs.q: Cambodia's parliament consists of the National Assembly and:
mcqs.explanation: Cambodia's bicameral parliament = National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Folketing is the unicameral parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Folketinget (often shortened to Folketing) is the unicameral parliament of Denmark — 179 members.

mcqs.q: Riigikogu is the unicameral legislature of:
mcqs.explanation: Riigikogu is the unicameral parliament of Estonia — 101 members.

mcqs.q: Eduskunta is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Eduskunta (Finnish) / Riksdagen (Swedish) is the unicameral parliament of Finland — 200 members.

mcqs.q: France's parliament consists of the National Assembly and:
mcqs.explanation: France has a bicameral parliament — National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Bundestag is the lower house of:
mcqs.explanation: The Bundestag is the lower house of Germany's bicameral parliament. The Bundesrat (Federal Council) is the upper house.

mcqs.q: Vouli ton Ellinon is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Vouli ton Ellinon (Hellenic Parliament) is the unicameral parliament of Greece — 300 members.

mcqs.q: Hungary's National Assembly has been unicameral since:
mcqs.explanation: Hungary's National Assembly has been unicameral since 2014 — 199 members under the 2011 constitution.

mcqs.q: The Japanese Diet consists of the House of Representatives and House of:
mcqs.explanation: Japan's bicameral National Diet = House of Representatives + House of Councillors.

mcqs.q: Majlis is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Iran's unicameral parliament is the Majles Shoraye Eslami — often called simply 'Majlis'.

mcqs.q: Oireachtas consists of Dáil Éireann and:
mcqs.explanation: Ireland's Oireachtas = Dáil Éireann (lower) + Seanad Éireann (upper).

mcqs.q: Knesset is the unicameral parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: The Knesset is Israel's unicameral 120-member parliament in Jerusalem.

mcqs.q: Lok Sabha is which house of the Indian Parliament?
mcqs.explanation: Lok Sabha ('House of the People') is the lower house of India's bicameral Sansad. Rajya Sabha is the upper house.

mcqs.q: Jordan's National Assembly consists of the House of Representatives and:
mcqs.explanation: Jordan's National Assembly is bicameral — House of Representatives (elected) + Senate (appointed by the King).

mcqs.q: Kazakhstan's parliament consists of the Senate and:
mcqs.explanation: Kazakhstan's bicameral parliament = Senate (upper) + Mazhilis (lower).

mcqs.q: Kenya's parliament consists of the National Assembly and:
mcqs.explanation: Kenya's bicameral parliament = National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper). Collectively also called the Bunge.

mcqs.q: Laos has a ___ parliament.
mcqs.explanation: Laos has a unicameral National Assembly — the country's supreme legislative body.

mcqs.q: Saeima is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Saeima is the unicameral parliament of Latvia — 100 members.

mcqs.q: Libya's House of Representatives replaced the:
mcqs.explanation: Libya's House of Representatives, elected in 2014, replaced the General National Congress (GNC).

mcqs.q: Seimas is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Seimas is the unicameral parliament of Lithuania — 141 members.

mcqs.q: Chamber of Deputies is the unicameral parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Luxembourg has a unicameral Chamber of Deputies (Chambre des Députés) — 60 members.

mcqs.q: Dewan Rakyat is the lower house of:
mcqs.explanation: Malaysia's bicameral Parlimen = Dewan Rakyat (lower, elected) + Dewan Negara (upper, appointed).

mcqs.q: People's Majlis is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: People's Majlis is the unicameral parliament of the Maldives — 87 members.

mcqs.q: State Great Khural is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Ulsiin Ih Hural (State Great Khural) is Mongolia's unicameral parliament — 76 members.

mcqs.q: Congress of the Union is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Mexico's bicameral parliament is the Congress of the Union — Chamber of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: Skupština is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Skupština is the parliament of Montenegro (and historically used in Serbia/Yugoslavia).

mcqs.q: Pyithu Hluttaw is the lower house of:
mcqs.explanation: Myanmar's Assembly of the Union (Pyidaungsu Hluttaw) consists of the Pyithu Hluttaw (lower) and Amyotha Hluttaw (upper).

mcqs.q: Storting is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Stortinget is the unicameral parliament of Norway — 169 members.

mcqs.q: Majlis-e-Shoora consists of the National Assembly and:
mcqs.explanation: Pakistan's Majlis-e-Shoora (Parliament) is bicameral — National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Paraguay's Congress consists of the Chamber of Deputies and:
mcqs.explanation: Paraguay's bicameral Congress = Chamber of Deputies (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Sejm is the lower house of:
mcqs.explanation: Poland's bicameral parliament = Sejm (lower) + Senat (upper).

mcqs.q: State Duma is the lower house of:
mcqs.explanation: Russia's bicameral Federal Assembly = State Duma (lower) + Federation Council (upper).

mcqs.q: Cortes Generales is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Spain's bicameral parliament is Cortes Generales — Congress of Deputies + Senate.

mcqs.q: Riksdag has been unicameral since:
mcqs.explanation: Sweden's Riksdagen has been unicameral since 1971 — 349 members.

mcqs.q: Sudan's National Legislature is currently:
mcqs.explanation: Sudan's transitional government operates a unicameral Transitional Legislative Council (under the 2019 constitutional declaration).

mcqs.q: South Africa's upper house is called:
mcqs.explanation: South Africa's bicameral parliament = National Assembly (lower) + National Council of Provinces (upper).

mcqs.q: Libandla is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Libandla is the bicameral parliament of Eswatini (formerly Swaziland) — House of Assembly + Senate.

mcqs.q: Narodno Sobranie is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Narodno Sobranie (National Assembly) is the unicameral parliament of Bulgaria — 240 members.

mcqs.q: Grand National Assembly is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: The Grand National Assembly of Türkiye (TBMM) is the unicameral parliament of Türkiye — 600 members.

mcqs.q: Majlis al-Umma is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Majlis al-Umma is the unicameral parliament of Kuwait — 50 elected members.

mcqs.q: Majlis al-Shura in Saudi Arabia is:
mcqs.explanation: Saudi Arabia's Majlis al-Shura (Consultative Assembly) is fully appointed by the King — 150 members.

mcqs.q: Advisory Council of Qatar has:
mcqs.explanation: Qatar's Majlis Al-Shura has limited legislative powers — partially elected since 2021 but with the Emir holding ultimate authority.

mcqs.q: Vietnam's National Assembly is:
mcqs.explanation: Vietnam has a unicameral National Assembly (Quoc-Hoi) — about 500 members.

mcqs.q: Austria's upper house is called:
mcqs.explanation: Austria's bicameral Federal Assembly = Nationalrat (lower) + Bundesrat / Federal Council (upper).

mcqs.q: Which parliament is called the 'Mother of Parliaments'?
mcqs.explanation: The UK Parliament at Westminster is called the 'Mother of Parliaments' — its Westminster system has been adopted across the Commonwealth.

mcqs.q: US Congress consists of the House of Representatives and:
mcqs.explanation: The US Congress is bicameral — House of Representatives (435 seats) + Senate (100 seats).

mcqs.q: How many members are in the European Parliament (2024)?
mcqs.explanation: The European Parliament has 720 MEPs from 27 EU member states after the 2024 elections (up from 705).

mcqs.q: Verkhovna Rada is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Verkhovna Rada (Supreme Council) is the unicameral parliament of Ukraine — 450 seats.

mcqs.q: Slovakia's parliament is:
mcqs.explanation: Slovakia has a unicameral National Council (Národná rada) — 150 members.

mcqs.q: Switzerland's lower house is called:
mcqs.explanation: Switzerland's bicameral Federal Assembly = National Council (lower, 200 seats) + Council of States (upper, 46 seats).

mcqs.q: Serbia's National Assembly is:
mcqs.explanation: Serbia has a unicameral National Assembly — 250 members.

mcqs.q: Venezuela's National Assembly is:
mcqs.explanation: Venezuela has a unicameral National Assembly (Asamblea Nacional) — 277 members under the 2020 reform.

mcqs.q: Zimbabwe's parliament consists of the National Assembly and:
mcqs.explanation: Zimbabwe's bicameral parliament = National Assembly (lower) + Senate (upper).

mcqs.q: Majlisi Oli is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Majlisi Oliy (Supreme Assembly) is the bicameral parliament of Tajikistan.

mcqs.q: Turkmenistan's Majlis has been unicameral since:
mcqs.explanation: Turkmenistan abolished its upper Khalk Maslakhaty in 2023, making the Majlis unicameral again.

mcqs.q: Inatsisartut is the parliament of:
mcqs.explanation: Inatsisartut is the unicameral parliament of Greenland (an autonomous territory of Denmark) — 31 members.

mcqs.q: Which parliament has the largest membership?
mcqs.explanation: China's National People's Congress (NPC) has nearly 3,000 deputies — the largest legislature in the world.

mcqs.q: Which region has the highest female representation in parliaments?
mcqs.explanation: The Nordic Parliaments (Sweden, Norway, Finland, Iceland, Denmark) consistently lead the world in female representation — often 40%+.

mcqs.q: What is considered the 'Parliament of the World'?
mcqs.explanation: The UN General Assembly, where all 193 UN member states are represented equally, is informally called the 'Parliament of the World'.

mcqs.q: Does the UK Parliament have a single written constitution?
mcqs.explanation: The UK has no single written constitutional document — it is one of very few countries with an uncodified constitution.
